title: Crow linked Limited Summon returns to hand

card.rawText: Summon Requirement: You may summon this creature normally, or Limited Summon it if your primary creature has "Crow" in its name. If your primary creature leaves the field or changes control, return this card to your hand.

effect.value: Summon Requirement: You may summon this creature normally, or Limited Summon it if your primary creature has "Crow" in its name. If your primary creature leaves the field or changes control, return this card to your hand.

plan.title: Crow linked Limited Summon returns to hand

notes: Read text first: Summon Requirement: You may summon this creature normally, or Limited Summon it if your primary creature has "Crow" in its name. If your primary creature leaves the field or changes control, return this card to your hand.
